name: cpig-bool-refactor-00-sphere-baseline
description: Baseline smoke test for the Phase 1 FieldWrapper refactor — a single CPigSphere must still create + auto-display. Verifies FieldWrapper::Kind::LIBFIVE leaf path (= unchanged from pre-refactor: libfive_tree_eval_f) and the LIBFIVE write-path in evaluate(). If the refactor broke leaf evaluation, no GLSL frame presents and WaitForPenumbraFrame times out.

checkpoints.name: sphere-baseline
checkpoints.description: One CPig SDF sphere (radius 10 at origin), ray-marched via the LIBFIVE leaf path.
